employee.title: My Trainings
employee.subtitle: Here you can see an overview of your completed trainings. You can contest entries if you attended a different training or the information is incorrect.
employee.emptyDescription: No training participations have been recorded for your account yet.

contestModal.title: Contest Training Record
contestModal.hint: If you did not attend this training, the date is wrong, or you attended a different training, you can explain this here. A compliance officer will review your request.
contestModal.reasonPlaceholder: e.g. 'I did not attend this training on that date, but attended Data Protection Training B instead.'

allClear.title: All clear
allClear.description: No open tasks or action items for your role.

passkey.title: No passkey configured
passkey.description: Enhance your account security with a passkey. Click your profile picture and choose “Add passkey”.
